summary: Git submodule configuration errors prevent test execution. The CI job cannot lock .git/modules config files and cannot unset core.worktree settings in submodules during initialization.
root_cause: Git submodule file locking failure - the CI environment cannot acquire locks on .git/modules/library/backtrace/config and is unable to properly unset core.worktree settings in submodules, preventing test initialization

evidence.quote: error: could not lock config file .git/modules/library/backtrace/con
evidence.reason: Explicit git error indicating the CI environment cannot acquire locks on submodule config files, blocking repository initialization

evidence.quote: warning: Could not unset core.worktree setting in submodule 'src/doc
evidence.reason: Related git submodule configuration failure showing incomplete or blocked submodule setup during initialization
Config file locking error appears 12 times and core.worktree warning appears 11 times, indicating a systematic submodule initialization failure rather than transient error

suggested_fix: Investigate git submodule state in the CI environment; clear any stale lock files from .git/modules and verify directory permissions are correct before reinitializing submodules
